message:
feat: add all 21 buffer tests to fast runner

Complete buffer test parity with slow runner:
- buffer-allocUnsafe, buffer-from-arraybuffer, buffer-fill
- buffer-includes, buffer-compare, buffer-write-read-uint
- buffer-write-read-float, buffer-toString-encoding
- buffer-isBuffer, buffer-byteLength, buffer-toJSON

Results: 21/21 tests in 4s (was 1102s - 275x faster)
